name: Salisbury Steaks
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces Beef gravy, canned OR homemade
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the ground beef, egg white, onion, saltine cracker crumbs, milk, horseradish, salt (if desired), and pepper.
2. Shape the mixture into 4 oval patties.
3. Fry the patties in a skillet over medium heat for 10 to 12 minutes or until cooked through, turning once.
4. Remove the patties and keep them warm.
5. Add the beef gravy, mushrooms, and water to the skillet; heat for 3 to 5 minutes.
6. Serve over the patties and noodles if desired.
Nutritional info. per serving: 248 cal., 205mg sodium, 66mg choles.,9gm carbo.,25gm protein, 12gm fat.
